Videos & Pics from Previous Events

DevOpsDays TLV

DevOpsDays is a worldwide series of technical conferences covering topics of software development, IT infrastructure operations, and the intersection between them. DevOpsDays Tel Aviv is one of the largest DevOpsDays events globally, featuring world-class speakers, hands-on workshops, and unparalleled networking opportunities.
Find all of our previous event videos and pics below.
